ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "paradigm" TEXT /* Experimental paradigm (e.g., ERP, fMRI, etc.) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., questionnaire, EEG, etc.) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, etc.) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., valid cue, invalid cue, etc.) */,
  "onset" REAL /* Onset time of the trial */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the trial */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus presented (e.g., visual, auditory, etc.) */,
  "stimulus_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response required (e.g., button press, vocal, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the condition belongs to */,
  "object_condition" TEXT /* Object condition (e.g., GRE, OBJ, etc.) */,
  "validity_condition" TEXT /* Validity condition (e.g., V, NV, etc.) */,
  "stimulus_contrast" REAL /* Contrast of the stimulus */,
  "response_deadline" REAL /* Deadline for response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* Native language of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to make the response */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., correct, incorrect, etc.) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_memory" (
  "source_memory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source memory record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the source memory record belongs to */,
  "source_memory_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of source memory */,
  "source_memory_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for source memory */,
  "source_memory_type" TEXT /* Type of source memory (e.g., old, new, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_memory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_memory_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_memory_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsequent_recognition" (
  "subsequent_recognition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsequent recognition record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the subsequent recognition record belongs to */,
  "subsequent_recognition_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of subsequent recognition */,
  "subsequent_recognition_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for subsequent recognition */,
  "subsequent_recognition_type" TEXT /* Type of subsequent recognition (e.g., hit, miss, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsequent_recognition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsequent_recognition_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsequent_recognition_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., behavioral, physiological, etc.) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_files ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user granted permission */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file the permission belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read, write, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_files ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_files ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, etc.) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new data, system update, etc.) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
